# Richard — History

## Core Context

- **Project:** Squad-SpecKit Bridge
- **Role:** Technical Lead
- **Joined:** 2025-07-19

## Learnings

### 2025-07-21: Specification Workflow Insights

Spec Kit pipeline: spec → plan → tasks. Each phase produces markdown artifacts.
Plan.md can be overwritten by re-running setup-plan.sh — always commit before re-running.

- Commit artifacts before re-running pipeline phases
- Tasks should reference spec sections for traceability
